Explanation: Keith Emerson was a founding member of Emerson, Lake & Palmer (formed in 1970), fitting the band formation date. He was previously in "The Nice" (a band with "organ" in the name, as "nice" is a play on "the heart" in French, but this is a stretch; however, he was a renowned organist and the band was known for its organ-driven sound). He was also associated with the band "Flower Kings" (but not as a member; this may be a confusion). However, the evidence shows he had triple bypass surgery and did voice acting work. The band Emerson, Lake & Palmer fits the formation period and his medical and artistic history [82316].
Exact Answer: Emerson, Lake & Palmer
Confidence: 70%
